name: Dobrogea
summary: Danube-Black Sea ethnographic area marked by multicultural traditions and coastal-inland exchanges.

games.name: Hora dobrogeana
games.description: Circle dance adapted to mixed local repertoires from delta and steppe settlements.

costumes.name: Port dobrogean
costumes.description: Regional festive dress combining Balkan, Anatolian, and Romanian textile elements.

traditions.name: Ritualuri pescaresti
traditions.description: Seasonal blessings and communal customs linked to fishing communities.
